title: Jerome Lattimore's Altered Departure Times
description: When the players examine the last three interception attempts against the network's actual departure records — held in Mercy Voss's hidden accounts beneath the dry goods store floor — a pattern emerges: each time the catchers arrived, they were between forty-five minutes and one hour late. Someone inside the network was feeding information but deliberately skewing the timing. Only a person who knew the real departure time and chose to alter it would produce this pattern. Jerome Lattimore handled the departure notifications for all three groups.
